# Requirements Specification: Authentication

**Feature-id:** auth
**Module:** P1.SP1.M1

## Requirements

### REQ-auth-001
The system must authenticate users via OAuth 2.0.

**Module:** P1.SP1.M1

### REQ-auth-002
Sessions must expire after 24 hours of inactivity.

**Module:** P1.SP1.M1
